title: ProviderConfig
description: Configuration for an LLM provider used by the Lintellect prompt-runner. Defines which provider to use, model parameters, timeout and retry behavior, and optional fallback. Loaded from environment variables, CLI flags, or a configuration file.

provider.description: LLM provider identifier. Determines which adapter implementation is instantiated by the ProviderFactory.

modelId.description: Model identifier in the provider's format. For claude-direct, use Anthropic model IDs (e.g., 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514'). For bedrock, use Bedrock model IDs (e.g., 'anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0').

temperature.description: Sampling temperature for LLM generation. Lower values produce more deterministic output. Each review pass overrides this with its own temperature, but this value serves as the default.

maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the LLM is allowed to generate per request. Controls the output budget for each review pass. Must be positive.

timeoutMs.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds. If the LLM does not respond within this window, the request is cancelled and may be retried according to the retry policy.

retryPolicy.description: Retry configuration for transient LLM failures (rate limits, server errors, network timeouts). Implements exponential backoff with optional jitter.

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts after the initial request fails. Set to 0 to disable retries.

baseDelayMs.description: Base delay in milliseconds for the first retry. Subsequent retries double this value (exponential backoff) up to maxDelayMs.

maxDelayMs.description: Maximum delay cap in milliseconds. Exponential backoff will not exceed this value regardless of retry count.

jitter.description: Whether to add random jitter to the backoff delay. When true, the actual delay is a random value between 0 and the calculated backoff delay. Recommended to prevent thundering herd on shared rate limits.

fallbackProvider.description: Optional fallback provider identifier. When the primary provider exhausts all retries or returns a non-retryable error, the prompt-runner automatically retries using this provider. Must be a valid provider enum value different from the primary provider.

region.description: AWS region for the Bedrock provider. Required when provider is 'bedrock'. Ignored for 'claude-direct'. Must be a valid AWS region where Bedrock and the specified model are available.

apiKeySecretArn.description: ARN of the AWS Secrets Manager secret containing the Anthropic API key. Used by the claude-direct provider in AWS Lambda environments. In local/CLI environments, the API key is read from the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable instead.
